@graph.description:
This dataset contains 85 files generated through:

  • Sequencing phase: runs performed using Illumina iScan

It also includes RO-Crate metadata file (ro-crate-metadata.json) that describes the context of data generation, such as the laboratory environment, the research institute, and the instruments used.
@graph.name: LAGE Experimental Dataset for the Repository: ORID0036

@graph.description: Script to generate RO-Crate descriptors for lab raw data folders.
@graph.name: LAGE Folder Descriptor Generator

@graph.description: Logic used to reconstruct sample-centric provenance from fragmented metadata.
@graph.name: LAGE Sample History Extractor

@graph.description: Quality control process for samples before sequencing, including electrophoretic analysis using the Agilent TapeStation 4200 to assess DNA/RNA integrity and size distribution.
@graph.name: TapeStation Quality Control

@graph.description: Quality control process for samples before sequencing, which may include NanoDrop UV absorbance measurements, report of technical observations and anomalies detected (both before and after sequencing), and other QC steps.
@graph.name: Sample Quality Control

@graph.description: Quality control process after sequencing, which includes FastQC analysis of raw FASTQ files.
@graph.name: Post-Sequencing Quality Control

@graph.description: Initial phase where the researcher or client provides the samples and plate scheme description before sequencing.
@graph.name: Sample Acceptance Phase

@graph.description: Nanopore raw signal data format replacing FAST5.
@graph.name: POD5

@graph.description: Gzipped FASTQ format for storing biological sequences and quality scores, generated during the post-sequencing basecalling step.
@graph.name: FASTQ GZipped

@graph.description: Binary representation of the Sequence Alignment/Map (SAM) format.
@graph.name: BAM (Binary Alignment Map)

@graph.description: Index file for rapid access to BAM alignment files.
@graph.name: BAI (BAM Index)

@graph.description: Custom archive format used for storing complex datasets with embedded metadata.
@graph.name: XAD Archive

@graph.description:
Main data directory containing outputs from the following phases:

  • Sequencing phase: runs performed using Illumina iScan

This dataset includes:

  • 1 .json files
  • 84 .csv files
@graph.name: ORID0036
